<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IEnvelope</span> envelope = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">EnvelopeClass</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.XMin = centerPoint.X - DeltaX;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.XMax = centerPoint.X + DeltaX;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.YMin = centerPoint.Y - DeltaY;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.YMax = centerPoint.Y + DeltaY;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.ZMin = centerPoint.Z - DeltaZ;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.ZMax = centerPoint.Z + DeltaZ;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
MakeZAware(envelope <span style="COLOR: blue">as</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> envelope <span style=
"COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style="MARGIN: 0in 0in 10pt"><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; LINE-HEIGHT: 115%; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
}</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">private</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">static</span> <span style="COLOR: teal">IPoint</span>
GetPoint()</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Min = -10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Max = 10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">Random</span> random = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">Random</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> x = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> y = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> z = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> ConstructPoint3D(x, y,
z);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>

"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">

<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>

<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
x,</span> <span style=

double</span> <span style=

double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
z)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=

<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">

"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">

"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point = ConstructPoint2D(x, y);</span></p>

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>

"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">

"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point;</span></p>

<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">

}<br>

<span style=

IGeometry_GeoNormalize()

Shifts longitudes, if need be, into a continuous range of 360 degrees.

virtual void IGeometry_GeoNormalize()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double)

Normalizes longitudes into a continuous range containing the longitude. This method is obsolete.

virtual void IGeometry_GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double Longitude)

Parameters

Longitude double

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_GeometryType

The type of this geometry.

virtual esriGeometryType IGeometry_GeometryType { get; }

Returns

esriGeometryType

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_IsEmpty

Indicates whether this geometry contains any points.

virtual bool IGeometry_IsEmpty { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_Project(ISpatialReference) 

virtual void IGeometry_Project(ISpatialReference newReferenceSystem)

Parameters

newReferenceSystem ISpatialReference

IGeometry_QueryEnvelope(IEnvelope) 

virtual void IGeometry_QueryEnvelope(IEnvelope outEnvelope)

Parameters

outEnvelope IEnvelope

IGeometry_SetEmpty()

Removes all points from this geometry.

virtual void IGeometry_SetEmpty()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_SnapToSpatialReference()

Moves points of this geometry so that they can be represented in the precision of the geometry's associated spatial reference system.

virtual void IGeometry_SnapToSpatialReference()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_SpatialReference

The spatial reference associated with this geometry.

virtual ISpatialReference IGeometry_SpatialReference { get; set; }

Returns
